name: Suzhou Keda Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Suzhou Keda Technology Co., Ltd provides video surveillance and conference products and solutions to public and corporate customers in China. The company's video surveillance products include intelligent cameras, human recognitive cameras, and recognitive tracking systems; commercial and professional network video recorders; network cameras comprising box, IR bullet, semi dome, fisheye, speed dome, explosion proof, and PTZ cameras; video management systems; and vehicle and portable mobile surveillance solutions. Its video surveillance products also consist of encoders and decoders; keyboards; gateways and streaming media servers; network storage products, such as IP SANs and private cloud storage systems; and LED and LCD displays, and splicing processors. The company's video conference products include multipoint control units and media stream servers; meeting room and software endpoints; and peripheral devices, which consist of cameras and microphones. In addition, it offers video application solutions, including emergency dispatch system, remote compliant reception, remote prison visit, distance learning, surgical operation demo system, digital court, and remote video interrogation solutions. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
